choices.text: Address derived from seeds + program ID, off-curve (no private key). Only the deriving program can sign for it. Deterministic — recover by computing again. Used for per-user state, vaults, global config.
Store bump on account at init; use `bump = profile.bump` constraint to skip find_program_address (which iterates up to 256 bumps). Saves thousands of CU per call.

questions.explanation: Cache bump on account; reuse in constraint.
